seoTitle: Hampden vs Hampstead Gardens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hampden and Hampstead Gardens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hampden vs Hampstead Gardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hampden and Hampstead Gardens.
heading: Hampden vs Hampstead Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hampden, South Australia and Hampstead Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hampstead Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Hampden (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hampden or Hampstead Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hampden has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Hampstead Gardens scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hampden scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Hampstead Gardens scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hampden or Hampstead Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hampstead Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
